feed.indexTagline: Zviri zvako. Mafambisirwo ako. Mitemo yako.

list.seoDescription: Tsidzira mari kuzviito, humbowo, kana zvinobuda zvauri kuda kukurudzira.
list.heroBody: Tsigira mari kuzviito, humbowo, uye zvibereko. Vanhu vanopindura nemikana yavo, uye nharaunda inopa mubayiro pabasa rinofambisa chinangwa mberi.

card.confirmDelete: Bvisa chitsidziro ichi? Izvi hazvigoni kudzosererwa.

create.seoDescription: Gadzira chitsidziro chemupi kuti ukurudzire chiito chinokosha pa{{appName}}.
create.loginGateBody: Zvitsidziro zviitiko zveNostr zvakasaina. Unoda kupinda muNostr kuti uburitse chimwe.
create.heading: Gadzira chitsidziro
create.title: Musoro
create.descriptionPlaceholder: Tsanangura chiito, humbowo, kana mhedzisiro yauri kuda kukurudzira, zvinofanira kuva muzvirongwa, uye uchazviongorora sei...
create.timezoneNote: Nguva yekutanga neyemugumo zvichaverengerwa munzvimbo yenguva iyi.
create.errorLoginRequired: Unofanira kunge wakapinda kuti ugadzire chitsidziro.
create.errorPledgeInvalid: Mari yechitsidziro inofanira kunge iri USD inopfuura zero.
create.errorPriceUnavailable: Kumirira mutengo weBTC/USD kuti ubatanidze mari yechitsidziro.
create.errorCoverInvalid: Mufananidzo wepamusoro unofanira kuva URL ye https:// chaiyo.

detail.submissionPlaceholder: Govera humbowo, uchapupu, kana basa rapera...
detail.noSubmissionsHint: Iva wekutanga kupindura nehumbowo, uchapupu, kana basa rapera.
detail.trustNote: Chitsidziro ichi chinotsamira pakuvimba. Kufambisa kwemari kunosanganisa mazaps neresiti dzezvipo pamhinduro dzepamusoro.
detail.storyEmpty: Akapa chitsidziro haasati anyora rondedzero yechitsidziro ichi.

list.seoDescription: Wana woziva uye joiner mapoka paNostr
list.heroBody: Gadzira mapoka, unganidza nhengo, uye ramba uchitarisa zviri kuitika munzvimbo dzako.
list.createGroupLoginBody: Kugadzira boka kunoburitsa chiitiko cheNostr kubva muakaundi yako.
list.loginToSeeBody: Mapoka awakatanga kana aunotungamira achaonekwa pano.
list.noGroupsBody: Gadzira boka rako kuti utange kurongedza mishandirapamwe, zvitsidziro, nezviitiko nevanhu vako.
list.noFeaturedBody: Vatungamiri ve{{appName}} vanonyora mapoka akakurumbira pano. Dzoka pasinaapfuura nguva.
list.needsReviewDesc: Mapoka e{{appName}} asati anyorwa kana kuvanzwa. Simudza rimwe kushelf yanokurumbira kana kuriderera nokuvigwa.
list.hiddenDesc: Mapoka akadzvinyirirwa kubva mukuwanikwa pachena. Shandisa menu yekebab pakadhi kuti ubvise kuvanzwa.

create.loginGateBody: Mapoka zviitiko zveNostr zvakasaina. Unoda kupinda muNostr kuti uburitse rimwe.
create.invalidEditBody: Rink iyi yokugadzirisa boka hapana nzvimbo yeboka yakakodzera.
create.cannotEditBody: Mutangi weboka chete ndiye anogona kurivandudza.
create.name: Zita
create.errorLoginRequired: Unofanira kunge wakapinda kuti ugadzire boka.
create.errorEditNotOwner: Mutangi weboka chete ndiye anogona kurigadzirisa.
create.errorNameInvalid: Zita rinofanira kuva nemavara kana manhamba kuti URL yeboka igadzirike.
create.errorEditLatestMissing: Hatina kuwana shanduro yazvino yeboka iri kuti tirivandudze.
create.errorCoverInvalid: Mufananidzo wepamusoro unofanira kuva URL ye https:// chaiyo.
create.errorSlugCollision: Une kare boka rine kupiwa zita kwe«{{slug}}». Sarudza rimwe zita.

campaignsCreate.seoDescriptionEdit: Vandudza campaign yako yekuunganidza mari pa{{appName}}.
campaignsCreate.loginGateBody: Macampaign zviitiko zveNostr zvakasaina. Unoda kupinda muNostr kuti uburitse rimwe.
campaignsCreate.invalidEditBody: Rink iyi yokugadzirisa campaign hapana nzvimbo yecampaign yakakodzera.
campaignsCreate.cannotEditBody: Munyori wecampaign chete ndiye anogona kuvandudza.
campaignsCreate.title: Musoro
campaignsCreate.customWalletIntro: Isa kero yeBitcoin, kodhi yemubhadharo unyararo, kana zvose. Imwechete inodikanwa zvirinani.
campaignsCreate.onchainInvalid: Haisi kero yeBitcoin mainnet inozivikanwa (bc1q… / bc1p…).
campaignsCreate.spInvalid: Haisi kodhi yeBIP-352 yemubhadharo unyararo inozivikanwa (sp1…).
campaignsCreate.summaryPlaceholder: Batsira clinic yedu yepamutemo munharaunda kudzivirira vanoratidza nokuyananisa.
campaignsCreate.storyPlaceholder: Govera nhoroondo, anobatsirwa, uye kuti mari ichashandiswa sei.
campaignsCreate.goalNote: Madhora eUS chete. Vapi vebhadhara muBitcoin; vatengi vanofungidzira mucherechedzo weUSD panguva yokutarisa.
campaignsCreate.successEditDesc: Shanduko dzekuunganidza mari kwako dziri kushanda.
campaignsCreate.errorLoginRequired: Unofanira kunge wakapinda kuti ugadzire campaign.
campaignsCreate.errorEditNotOwner: Munyori wecampaign chete ndiye anogona kuigadzirisa.
campaignsCreate.errorTitleInvalid: Musoro unofanira kuva nemavara kana manhamba kuti URL yecampaign igadzirike.
campaignsCreate.errorSlugInvalid: Kupiwa zita kunofanira kunge kune mavara madiki, manhamba, uye dashes.
campaignsCreate.errorSpUnavailable: Kero yemubhadharo unyararo haiwanikwi pakupinda uku.
campaignsCreate.errorOnchainInvalid: Kero yepa-chain haisi kero yebech32(m) mainnet inozivikanwa (bc1q… / bc1p…).
campaignsCreate.errorSpInvalid: Kodhi yemubhadharo unyararo haisi kodhi yeBIP-352 inozivikanwa (sp1…).
campaignsCreate.errorWalletRequired: Ipa zvirinani imwechete chinangwa chechikwama — kero yeBitcoin mainnet (bc1q… / bc1p…) kana kodhi yemubhadharo unyararo (sp1…).
campaignsCreate.errorGoalInvalid: Chinangwa chinofanira kunge chiri madhora akakwana anopfuura zero.
campaignsCreate.errorEditLatestMissing: Hatina kuwana shanduro yazvino yecampaign iyi kuti tirivandudze.
campaignsCreate.errorSlugCollision: Une kare campaign ine kupiwa zita kwe«{{slug}}». Sarudza rimwe.
campaignsCreate.errorBannerInvalid: Bhana inofanira kuva URL ye https:// chaiyo.
campaignsCreate.errorHdDeriveFailed: Hatina kukwanisa kuwana kero itsva yepa-chain kubva muchikwama chako.
campaignsCreate.errorHdDeriveInvalid: Kero yakatorwa yatadza chenjedzo. Tapota wedzera kero yenyu.
campaignsCreate.errorPublishedInvalid: Chiitiko chakaburitswa chatadza chenjedzo. Tapota refresh moedza zvakare.

campaignsDetail.deletedToastDesc: Chikumbiro chekubvisa chakaburitswa. Marelay anozvibata zvakanaka achabvisa campaign mufeeds.
campaignsDetail.deleteDialogBody: Izvi zvinoburitsa chikumbiro chekubvisa cheNIP-09. Marelay anozvibata zvakanaka achabvisa campaign mufeeds nezvirink zvakananga. Rezvi dzezvipo dzapfuura dzinoramba dzakachengetwa pachain. Izvi hazvigoni kudzosererwa — kuti urambe uchigamuchira zvipo, gadzirisa campaign panzvimbo yokuti uibvise.
campaignsDetail.storyEmpty: Murongi haasati anyora nyaya yecampaign iyi.

home.heroBody: Unganidza Bitcoin yakananga kubva kuvatsigiri vepasi rose. Mupiro mumwe nemumwe unobva wapinda muchikwama chako, pasina vamiririri, pasina kudzoreredza, uye pasina platform inobata mari yako.
home.pendingDesc: Mishandirapamwe iri panetwork isati yatenderwa kana kuvanzwa naani zvake muTeam Soapbox.
home.hiddenDesc: Mishandirapamwe yakabviswa papeji rekutanga reveruzhinji. Shandisa menu pakadhi kuti uibvise pakuvanzwa.
home.yourCampaignsDesc: Mishandirapamwe yako iri panetwork yeNostr uye mipiro inoshanda kuburikidza nemurawu wemushandirapamwe. Inoonekwa papeji rekutanga kana muoni weTeam Soapbox aitenderera.
home.emptyHint: Iva wekutanga kutanga kuunganidza mari pa{{appName}}. Taura nyaya yako, sarudza vanobatsirwa, uchipa rwumwe rwekugovera.

all.title: Mishandirapamwe Yose
all.noMatchHint: Edza zvimwe zvinotsvagwa, kana ubvise kutsvaga kuti uone mishandirapamwe yose.
all.allHiddenHint: Mishandirapamwe yose pamutambo yakavanzwa nevatariri. Vhura «Ratidza dzakavanzwa» kuti uione.
all.emptyHint: Hapana mushandirapamwe wakatumirwa parizvino. Iva wokutanga.

sections.networkDesc: Kushandiswa kwedata, marelays, nemaserver ekuiswa kwemafaira.
sections.organizersDesc: Sarudza vagadziri venyika vanogona kuomesa zvitumbi pamufuto wenyika.

appearance.title: Maonero
appearance.subtitle: Sarudza kuti app inoonekwa sei.
appearance.intro: Sarudza mode yeruvara waunoda. «System» ichaenderana zvakazvimirira nemamiriro echiedza kana erima emudziyo wako.

network.title: Network
network.subtitle: Tarisira kushandiswa kwedata, marelays, nemaserver ekuiswa kwemafaira.
network.connectionsIntro: Tarisira mibatanidzwa yako yemarelays. Marelays maserver anochengeta nokuparadzira zviitiko zveNostr panetwork yose.
network.reduceDataUsageDesc: YeKubatana kunoyerwa kana kwakanonoka. Mavhidhiyo haaite kutamba ega, zviratidziro zvemavhidhiyo zviri shure zvinosiyiwa, uye mifananidzo inomirira kubatwa pamberi pekutakurwa.
network.useImageProxyDesc: Inotora mhando duku dzeWebP dzemifananidzo pane masikirwo akakwana.
network.proxyApiDesc: Inofanira kutaura <0>wsrv.nl / weserv</0> API. Vanozvichengeta vega vanogona kuinongedza kuchikamu chavo.
network.uploadQualityDesc: «Compressed» inopfupisa mifananidzo mikuru ichisarudza format diki. «Original» inoisa mifananidzo sezvairi.

advanced.title: Zvepamusoro
advanced.subtitle: Mibatanidzwa yechikwama, marongero esystem, nezvimwe zvinotenderwa kuvashandisi venyanzvi.
advanced.intro: Mibatanidzwa yechikwama, marongero esystem, nezvimwe zvepamusoro.

language.title: Mutauro
language.subtitle: Sarudza mutauro unoshandiswa muapp yose.
language.intro: Sarudza mutauro waunoda. App ichachinja ipapo ipapo uye icharangarira sarudzo yako pamudziyo uyu.
language.translationNote: Shanduro dzichiri kuitwa. Mavara asina kushandurwa anozoonekwa muChirungu.

organizers.appointDesc: Ipa muridzi mvumo yekuomesa zvitumbi pamufuto wenyika yakatarwa.
organizers.alreadyOrganizer: Muridzi uyu atova mugadziri wenyika iyoyo
organizers.adminRequiredDesc: Vatariri vechikuva chete ndivo vanogona kusarudza kana kubvisa vagadziri.

wallet.seoDescription: Chikwama cheBitcoin chenhevedzano chinobva pa nsec yako yeNostr.

loggedOut.title: Chikwama cheBitcoin
loggedOut.description: Chikwama chenhevedzano chinobva pamuviri wako weNostr. Kero itsva pakugamuchira kwoga kwoga, nhoroondo yakazara yezvinoitwa, pasina kushandiswazve kwemakero.
loggedOut.requiresNsec: Inoda kupinda nensec (kiyi yako yakavanzika yeNostr).

unsupported.title: Chikwama hachiwanike
unsupported.extension: Yekuwedzera yebrowser yako inochengeta kiyi yako yakavanzika yakaparadzaniswa, saka hatigoni kubvisa makiyi evana kuchikwama chako.
unsupported.bunker: Mubatsiri wako weakure (NIP-46 bunker) anochengeta kiyi yako yakavanzika kudivi rebunker, saka hatigoni kubvisa makiyi evana kuchikwama chako.
unsupported.other: Mhando yako yekupinda haiburitse kiyi yakavanzika inodiwa kuti tibvise chikwama chako.
unsupported.instructions: Buda wodzosera kupinda nensec yako kuti ushandise chikwama.

receiveDialog.title: Gamuchira Bitcoin
receiveDialog.onChainIntro: Kero itsva nguva dzese. Chinjira kune index itsva mushure mokugovera kuti uchengetedze privacy.
receiveDialog.silentIntro: Chiratidzo chokugamuchira chakamira. Govera kamwe woshandisazve nokusingaperi — vatumiri vanobvisa kero yakasiyana pacheni pamubhadharo woga woga.
receiveDialog.noIndexer: Kuongorora kwadzimwa — hapana muongorori weBIP-352 wakaiswa. Isa <0>bip352IndexerUrl</0> mukurongedzwa kweapp yako kuti uone mibhadharo yakanyararira inopinda.

tx.silentDetectedTitle: Zvakaonekwa kuburikidza nokuongorora kwemubhadharo wakanyararira weBIP-352

walletRecovery.seoDescription: Garisa mari kubva muchikwama chekare cheLightning uye uitumira kukero yako yeBitcoin yakabva paNostr.
walletRecovery.title: Garisa chikwama chekare
walletRecovery.heading: Garisa chikwama chako chekare
walletRecovery.subheading: Kana iwe wakambova nemari muchikwama cheLightning, unogona kuibvisa wese uchiitumira kukero yako yeBitcoin yakabva paNostr. Chikwama chako chekare hachidzosererwi — uku kutumira kwekamwe chete uye nzira imwe.

loggedOut.title: Pinda kuti ugarise
loggedOut.description: Pinda nemuviri weNostr waiva mwene wechikwama chekare cheLightning kuti mari ibviswe ichiendeswa kukero yacho yeBitcoin.

phrase.title: Mutsara wekugarisa
phrase.description: Isa mutsara wekugarisa wemashoko gumi nemaviri kubva muchikwama chako chekare.
phrase.checkingRelays: Kutarisa marelays ako kuti tiwane backup yakavharirwa nekiyi…
phrase.backupFoundDesc: Takawana backup yakavharirwa nekiyi yemutsara wekugarisa wechikwama chako chekare yakatumirwa kubva paakaundi ino.
phrase.warning: Isa chete mutsara wekugarisa wamunovimba nawo. Ani naani anewo mutsara uyu anogona kushandisa mari. Kutumira kana kwapera, idzima panzvimbo dzese pawakaikopa.

sweeping.dontClose: Usavhare tabhu ino. Izvi zvinogona kutora kanosvika neminiti chikwama chekare chichiita synchronization uye zvinoitwa zvichitumirwa.

errors.noNip44: Musainiri wako haatsigire kuvhura kweNIP-44 kunodiwa kuverenga backup yerelay. Isa zvako mutsara wekugarisa wemashoko gumi nemaviri nemaoko.
errors.decryptFailed: Hatina kukwanisa kuvhura backup yerelay. Isa zvako mutsara wekugarisa wemashoko gumi nemaviri nemaoko.
errors.invalidWordCount: Mutsara wekugarisa unofanira kuva nemashoko gumi nemaviri kana makumi maviri nemana.
errors.noBalance: Chikwama chako chekare hachina bharanzi inogona kushandiswa. Hapana chinhu chekuti chigariswe.

toast.backupLoadedDesc: Mutsara wekugarisa wakavhurwa kubva pamarelays ako.

walletConnect.helpText: Isa yekuwedzera yebrowser yeWebLN kana batanidza chikwama cheNWC kuti utumire mazaps.

empty.title: Hapana zvikwama zvakabatanidzwa
empty.description: Wedzera mubatanidzwa weNWC kuti uite kuti mazap akurumidze.

dialog.title: Batanidza chikwama cheNWC
dialog.description: Isa connection string kubva pachikwama chako chinoenderana neNWC.

recipient.label: Mugamuchiri
recipient.sendingSp: Kutumira nemubhadharo wakanyararira — mugamuchiri anowana kero itsva, isingakwanise kubatanidzwa pacheni.

errors.unavailable: Chikwama cheHD hachiwanike pamhando yekupinda iyi.
errors.enterRecipient: Isa kero yeBitcoin, kero ye-sp1… kana npub.
errors.noSpendable: Hapana Bitcoin inogona kushandiswa muchikwama ichi.
errors.insufficient: Bitcoin haina kukwana pahuwandu uhwu + muripo wenetwork.

bitcoinPublic.lead: Mari yaunotumira inozivikanwa nemunhu wese uye inogona kudzokerwa kwauri.
bitcoinPublic.body: Bitcoin ibhuku reanozivikanwa nemunhu wese. Zvinoitwa zvaunotumira zvinogona kudzokerwa kwauri nekusingaperi, kunyangwe zvachinjwa nevanhu vakawanda. Tumira chete kune avo vaunoda kutsigira pachena.
bitcoinPublic.bodyWithCashOut: Bitcoin ibhuku reanozivikanwa nemunhu wese. Zvinoitwa zvaunotumira zvinogona kudzokerwa kwauri nekusingaperi, kunyangwe zvachinjwa nevanhu vakawanda. Tumira chete kune avo vaunoda kutsigira pachena, kana ushandure kumari yenyika paexchange.
bitcoinPublic.iUnderstand: Ndinonzwisisa kuti chinoitwa ichi chinozivikanwa nemunhu wese.

spScan.title: Tsvaga mibhadharo yakanyararira
spScan.description: Inotevera muongorori weBIP-352 wakarongwa bhuroka nebhuroka kuti iwane mibhadharo yakanyararira inopinda.
spScan.includeSpentDesc: Sanganisira mibhadharo yakanyararira yakazoshandiswa zvakare. Shandisa kana uchivaka history yokugamuchira mushure mekuongorora kwakapotsa kana kudzosera.

reconcile.title: Reconcile UTXOs dzakashandiswa
reconcile.description: Inotarisa UTXO yega yega yakachengetwa yemubhadharo wakanyararira pamberi peBlockbook uye inobvisa idzo dzakashandiswa. Shandisa kana bharanzi yakakwirira pane zvaifanira mushure mokutumira.

notifSettings.title: Zviziviso
notifSettings.subtitle: Gadzira kuti ndezvipi zviziviso zvauchawana.

enablePush.label: Vhura zviziviso zvepush
enablePush.description: Gamuchira zviziviso pamusoro pemabasa pazvinyorwa zvako

notifSettings.denied: Zviziviso zvakavharirwa. Vandudza zvirongwa zvebrowser yako kuti zvibvumire zviziviso kubva pasaiti iyi.

deliveryMethod.heading: Nzira yokuendesa
deliveryMethod.intro: Sarudza kuti zviziviso zvinoendeswa sei kumudziyo wako.

push.label: Push
push.description: Zviziviso zvakajairika. Hapana mucherechedzo unogara pabar yemamiriro.

persistent.label: Inogara
persistent.description: Inobvunza marelays zvakananga shure kweimwe nzvimbo zvichida zviziviso zvitsva. Shandisa izvi kuti uwane kuendeswa kunovimbika pamidziyo isina rutsigiro rwezviziviso zvepush.

onlyFollowing.label: Chete kubva kuvanhu vandinotevera
onlyFollowing.description: Vanza zviziviso kubva kuma akaundi auwanga usingatevere

reactions.label: Mhinduro
reactions.description: Kana mumwe munhu adavira kuzvinyorwa zvako

reposts.label: Kudzokorora
reposts.description: Kana mumwe munhu adzokorora nhau dzako

zaps.label: Zaps
zaps.description: Kana mumwe munhu akutumira zap kuburikidza neLightning kana pacheni

comments.label: Mhinduro nemibvunzo
comments.description: Kana mumwe munhu apa mhinduro kana kudavira kuzvinyorwa zvako

highlights.label: Kusimudzira
highlights.description: Kana mumwe munhu akasimudzira zviri muzvinyorwa zvako

empty.posts: Hapana mhinduro dzakawanikwa dzinoenderana nokutsvaga kwako.
empty.postsPrompt: Isa mubvunzo wokutsvaga kuti uwane zviri muNostr.
empty.accounts: Hapana maakaundi akawanikwa anoenderana nokutsvaga kwako.
empty.followsPrompt: Tsvaga vanhu nezita kana kero yeNIP-05.
empty.agora: Hapana macampaign, pledges, kana mapoka eAgora akawanikwa anoenderana nokutsvaga kwako.
empty.agoraPrompt: Tsvaga macampaign, pledges, nemapoka eAgora, kana kutarisa zvitsva.

profile.couldNotResolveNip05: Hatina kukwanisa kuziva chiratidzo cheNIP-05 ichi.

activity.empty: Hapana zviitiko zva{{name}} parizvino. Zvinyorwa, mishando, zvivimbiso, nezvipo zvose zvinoratidzwa pano.
